files.patch:
@@ -5369,0 +5369,6 @@
+            // Include gcc.md only on Linux
+            // FIXME: implement a more general solution; see JDK-8247948
+            if (!IS_LINUX) {
+                exclude("gcc.md")
+            }

@@ -5443,0 +5449,6 @@
+            // Include gcc.md only on Linux
+            // FIXME: implement a more general solution; see JDK-8247948
+            if (!IS_LINUX) {
+                exclude("gcc.md")
+            }
